summary: Chat application with messaging features. User is on Version 348. Implementing: quoted replies inside chat bubbles, action buttons always visible (icons only, no labels), and removing the extra character counter below the chat input (keeping the circular one inside the input).

existing_features.title: Move quoted reply previews inside the chat bubble so they appear as part of the message bubble content, above the message text, rather than outside or above the bubble.
Make message action buttons (reply, react, pin, etc.) always visible on every message bubble without requiring hover. Remove all text labels from action buttons, keeping only the icons.
Remove the character counter displayed below the chat input field. The circular character counter rendered inside the chat input must remain intact and unchanged.

new_feature_requests.summary: Move quoted replies inside the chat bubble
Make action buttons always visible with icons only (remove labels)
Remove extra character counter below chat input, keep only the circular one inside the input
